reapack.name: AiNOMEATOR.lua
reapack.desc: AiNOMEATOR — AI track namer, colorer and icon setter for REAPER using Gemini

metadata.description:
Automatically identifies the primary instrument of each track in Reaper using Gemini, then applies a name, color and icon.
[EN] IMPORTANT REQUIREMENT: This script relies on a Python backend. To run it: 1. Ensure you have Python 3.9+ installed and added to your system PATH. 2. If you installed via ReaPack, you MUST clone or download the full repository from GitHub (https://github.com/pontojasko/ReaperAiNOMEATOR) to get the "src" folder and "setup.bat". 3. Place all files in your Reaper Scripts folder under "/AiNOMEATOR" (so you have AiNOMEATOR.lua, setup.bat, and the "src" directory in the same folder). 4. Run "setup.bat" inside that folder to create the virtual environment and install dependencies. 5. Open the generated ".env" file in the same folder and add: GEMINI_API_KEY=your_key
[PT] REQUISITO IMPORTANTE: Este script depende de um backend em Python. Para fazê-lo funcionar: 1. Certifique-se de ter o Python 3.9+ instalado e no PATH do sistema. 2. Se você instalou pelo ReaPack, você DEVE baixar/clonar o repositório completo do GitHub (https://github.com/pontojasko/ReaperAiNOMEATOR) para obter a pasta "src" e o "setup.bat". 3. Coloque todos os arquivos na sua pasta de Scripts do Reaper dentro de "/AiNOMEATOR" (de modo que AiNOMEATOR.lua, setup.bat e a pasta "src" fiquem na mesma pasta). 4. Execute o "setup.bat" dentro dessa pasta para criar o ambiente virtual (venv) e instalar as dependências. 5. Abra o arquivo ".env" gerado na mesma pasta e adicione: GEMINI_API_KEY=sua_chave

version.author: pontojasko
version.changelog: Initial release: AI track naming, coloring and icon setting via Gemini API.

reapack.name: AiNOMEATOR_sws_sync.lua
reapack.desc: AiNOMEATOR SWS Color Sync — sync the AI color palette with SWS Auto Color

metadata.description: Syncs the color palette from reaper_ai_track_namer_colors.ini into Reaper's sws-autocoloricon.ini. Run this after AiNOMEATOR to make SWS Auto Color use the same palette.

version.author: pontojasko
version.changelog: Initial release: SWS Auto Color synchronization.
